tools.name: market_search
tools.description: Search prediction events and markets by topic, entity, or natural-language query. Read-only; use before requesting snapshots when the event slug is unknown.

tools.name: events_top
tools.description: Get top-ranked prediction events with tradability, liquidity, volume, and market-quality signals. Read-only.

tools.name: events_snapshots
tools.description: Fetch current pricing, volume, lifecycle, liquidity, and market-quality snapshots for up to 200 known event slugs. Read-only.

tools.name: event_get
tools.description: Get public metadata and current state for one Norynta event slug. Read-only.

tools.name: orderbook_get
tools.description: Get the live central-limit order book for a Norynta market and optional outcome. Read-only.

tools.name: agent_bootstrap
tools.description: Start here. Get Norynta agent discovery, access, protocol, entitlement, risk-control, and compatibility metadata in one read-only call.

tools.name: signal_match
tools.description: Map a caller-provided signal, filing summary, flow observation, or news thesis to currently discoverable Norynta events. Returns candidates for research, not a trade recommendation or proof of causation.

description: Fetch recent official SEC EDGAR filing metadata for a stock symbol or CIK, score catalyst attention, match the issuer to current Norynta markets, and attach live snapshots when available. Read-only research; never infers trade direction or executes an order.

description.name: finra_ats_discovery
description.description: Fetch delayed weekly FINRA ATS and non-ATS aggregates for a symbol, compare the latest week with prior weeks, and match candidate Norynta markets. This is not a live dark-pool print feed and never infers trade direction.

description.name: solana_whale_discovery
description.description: Inspect recent confirmed SOL and native-USDC balance changes for a supplied Solana address. Address identity and directional intent remain unknown unless independently verified.

description.name: signal_source_status
description.description: List free and licensed signal-source adapters, their freshness, configuration status, limitations, and write controls.

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "sec_signal_discovery" stacks urgency/override words (never, attention). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.
